# Easy Contracts

> Easy Contracts generates personalized influencer marketing contracts in bulk from a Word template and an Excel file.

Easy Contracts lets you upload a `.docx` contract template with `{{variables}}`, map an Excel sheet's columns to those variables, and download a ZIP with every personalized contract ready to send.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product landing page.
- [Influencer contract templates](/influencer-contract-templates): Guide to generating influencer marketing contracts at scale from a Word template and an Excel file.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in.
